mapper.sql: l.id, l.class_id, cr.class_name, l.teacher_id, u.real_name AS teacher_name, l.title, l.chapter, l.status, l.live_mode, l.start_time, l.end_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, l.start_time, IFNULL(l.end_time, NOW())) AS duration_min, l.current_slide, l.replay_url, l.replay_visible, m.id AS mat_id, m.title AS mat_title, m.page_count AS mat_page_count, m.slide_dir AS mat_slide_dir
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM lesson l INNER JOIN class_room cr ON cr.id = l.class_id AND cr.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = l.teacher_id LEFT JOIN course_material m ON m.id = l.material_id AND m.is_deleted = 0 WHERE l.id = #{lessonId} AND l.is_deleted = 0
